structure.app/core: Configuration, Settings, and Interfaces (Abstract Base Classes)
structure.app/services: Business Logic, AI Providers, Image Processing, Celery Tasks

solid_principles.SRP: Single Responsibility Principle - Classes/Functions should have one job.
solid_principles.OCP: Open/Closed Principle - Open for extension, closed for modification (use Interfaces).
solid_principles.LSP: Liskov Substitution Principle - Subclasses must be substitutable for base classes.
solid_principles.ISP: Interface Segregation Principle - Specific interfaces are better than general purpose ones.
solid_principles.DIP: Dependency Inversion Principle - Depend on abstractions, not concretions.

coding_standards.async_await: Use `async def` for API route handlers to prevent blocking.
coding_standards.type_hinting: Enforce strict type hinting using Python `typing` module.
coding_standards.configuration: Use `app/core/config.py` for all environment variables and settings.
coding_standards.error_handling: Use `HTTPException` for API errors. Log errors in background tasks.
coding_standards.naming_convention: snake_case for functions/variables, PascalCase for Classes.
